prompt: Which privacy regimes actually apply to your processing — GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA/CPRA and other US state laws, HIPAA, GLBA, COPPA, FERPA, PIPEDA, LGPD, sector-specific? List only what reaches your data; don't list aspirational coverage.

Are you primarily a controller (your own users, your purposes), a processor (customers' data, their purposes), or both — and with respect to whose data? This determines which half of the DPA playbook every review runs against.
